return(function(...)local k={"\075\122\110\052\108\111\061\061";"\114\119\072\078\054\056\087\061";"\048\111\061\061";"\099\071\089\078\099\056\086\104\120\088\057\113\051\088\110\056";"\079\055\083\052\100\113\088\051";"\098\056\110\050\120\075\051\081\049\067\110\080\099\054\054\081";"\049\084\077\081\049\102\057\047\120\088\098\061","\090\122\090\098\079\108\106\081\090\047\067\086\057\055\061\061";"\102\071\068\103\121\102\076\099";"\075\048\120\053\067\084\050\104\050\055\061\061","\098\084\119\086\120\084\055\061";"\107\116\107\054\054\114\097\078";"\047\111\097\103","\052\103\099\074\087\047\043\061";"\120\071\089\087\083\090\061\061";"\111\073\100\069\078\085\110\111\089\111\061\061","\070\075\077\047\120\088\117\069\073\090\061\061","\082\067\070\083\120\043\113\075";"\119\110\057\056\050\054\110\068\122\087\089\057\068\070\097\051","\102\043\101\053\079\102\080\113","\051\056\051\100\071\054\049\056\117\071\051\055\049\087\122\074\049\090\061\061","\047\111\072\071\071\111\119\067\118\051\061\061","\104\114\086\086\098\111\061\061";"\043\111\061\061";"\108\057\052\065\053\069\087\061";"\073\070\049\097\098\114\057\102\068\070\097\050\073\070\049\100","\113\054\111\065\119\111\061\061","\122\088\069\116\122\051\061\061","\110\075\069\071\122\056\122\088\122\099\110\110\110\084\110\055","\120\054\105\075\110\110\068\109\051\067\110\104\049\071\077\084\072\054\087\061";"\085\121\054\113\117\090\055\061","\112\054\086\075\068\110\047\100\083\089\049\083\112\089\119\099\122\090\061\061";"\118\084\100\090\056\048\099\102\065\111\061\061","\068\084\069\074\110\109\122\109\071\054\055\075\049\071\106\097","\072\081\097\075\117\102\122\122\049\102\049\121\099\080\086\054","\050\099\112\053\075\101\100\097\077\081\054\061";"\051\075\122\117\068\054\117\057\099\071\117\105\071\067\110\109";"\054\098\071\114\087\121\067\119\055\055\061\061";"\105\057\114\083\108\105\055\061","\120\089\104\052\117\056\097\087\071\067\117\072\098\109\110\083","\112\110\110\047\050\072\057\085\117\071\110\112\068
